commands.review_summary:
The PR normalizes provider-qualified stored model overrides in reply and parent-session resolution, adds a stale reset reason to the model override reset message, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +95. Total +130 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main resolves providerOverride plus provider-qualified modelOverride without the shared normalization and formats the reset as a not-allowed allowlist error. The baseline browser proof also shows the old rendered message; I did not run a full live dashboard rollover in this read-only review.
